meta.title: HELIX brief: author the governing artifacts

narration: You have a fresh repo. You know what you want to build. Step one: write the brief — the artifacts that govern the work.

prompt: /helix-frame Build a CSV-to-Parquet ingest pipeline for a healthcare claims processor

assistant: I'll author the four governing artifacts in authority order. Starting with the product vision.
Now the PRD with measurable success criteria.
Concerns: stack and quality choices the agent should respect.
First feature spec: CSV ingest with schema mapping.

output:
✓ vision · PRD · concerns · FEAT-001 — all authored from HELIX templates
  Authority order is now established. Any change downstream traces back here.

narration: Four documents, ordered by authority. The agent has a brief it can defend any code against.
